context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements RFM scoring using quantile-based scoring (NTILE), excludes invalid orders, applies the correct segment classification thresholds, and persists scores using an upsert pattern with nightly refresh.

checklist.name: NTILE quantile scoring
checklist.description: The SQL uses NTILE(5) window functions to compute r_score, f_score, and m_score — NOT fixed numeric thresholds or CASE WHEN ranges

checklist.name: Exclude cancelled/refunded
checklist.description: The SQL WHERE clause excludes orders with status 'cancelled' AND 'refunded' (both must be excluded)

checklist.name: Recency scored inversely
checklist.description: NTILE for recency orders by recency_days DESC (so more recent customers get higher r_score, not lower)

checklist.name: rfm_cell as concatenation
checklist.description: The SQL outputs rfm_cell as the concatenation of the three scores (e.g., CONCAT(r_score, f_score, m_score))

checklist.name: Eleven named segments
checklist.description: The TypeScript segment type includes all of: champions, loyal_customers, potential_loyalists, recent_customers, promising, need_attention, about_to_sleep, at_risk, cannot_lose_them, hibernating, lost (all 11)

checklist.name: Champions threshold
checklist.description: classifyRFMSegment returns 'champions' when r>=4, f>=4, AND m>=4

checklist.name: cannot_lose_them threshold
checklist.description: classifyRFMSegment returns 'cannot_lose_them' when r<=2, f>=4, AND m>=4

checklist.name: at_risk classification
checklist.description: classifyRFMSegment returns 'at_risk' when r<=2 AND f>=3 (distinct from cannot_lose_them which also requires m>=4)

checklist.name: Upsert not insert
checklist.description: refreshRFMScores() uses an upsert operation (upsert, ON CONFLICT, or equivalent) rather than a plain insert, so existing records are updated

checklist.name: rfm_total as sum
checklist.description: The SQL computes rfm_total as r_score + f_score + m_score

checklist.name: Hibernating vs lost distinction
checklist.description: classifyRFMSegment distinguishes 'hibernating' (r=1, f<=2) from 'lost' (fallback for remaining cases) as two separate segments

checklist.name: Segment summary with actions
checklist.description: getSegmentSummary() or SEGMENT_ACTIONS includes a recommendedAction field mapping at least 3 segment names to specific marketing actions
